verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You went out to the front line Committed to the cause You fought the fight of Faith You truly gave your all Now you lie there wounded With a bleeding heart You've cried for help but help just seems so far And you wonder where the other soldiers are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is coming for you wounded soldier And He will gently carry you upon His shoulder He will give you time to mend Till you can fight again There's no need to fear He is right here Wounded soldier

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes the greatest battles Are fought within your soul And no one sees your struggle 'Cause you wont let them show You're the one getting wounded Pretending to be strong But deep inside you're barely hanging on And it's hard to find the courage to go on

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am coming for you wounded soldier And I will gently carry you upon my shoulder I will give you time to mend Till you can fight again There's no need to fear I am right here Wounded soldier
